svg.text: OUTER LOOP · ADAPT THE REGULATOR — STRUCTURAL, OWNER-GATED
INNER LOOP · REGULATE — RUNS CONTINUOUSLY ON THE BUS
A household is a plant held at family-owned setpoints by feedback; when regulation falls short, the machinery itself is rewired — through git, reviewed.
tier gates authority: parameter-only auto-applies · behavioral & structural wait for the owner
the dashboard's “Now” view is this error signal — a house in equilibrium renders an empty page
